description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak Qt5 that triggers on push events with tags matching v* and on workflow dispatch. Run a job named Flatpak Builder with Qt 5.15 and Poppler on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with a privileged container. Check out the repository, build a flatpak package using a specified manifest and bundle, rename the package, and release it to GitHub if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
